sections.content: Welcome to your **free Economics** lesson on **Firms and production** (3.6). This is syllabus point 3.6 on **Paper 2 (Structured Questions)** — structured like a premium revision course, with past-paper practice built in.

Use “Explain simpler” below if the main lesson feels too advanced

sections.content: Cambridge 2281 rewards clear definitions, labelled diagrams, and applied examples from the data. On Paper 2 (Structured Questions), Firms and production often appears as MC items or structured questions — plan before writing longer answers.
